subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Sovereign of the Day of Judgment. Verily, it hath been revealed from the presence of God, the Lord of all worlds, and guideth mankind unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک یوم الدین انه نزل من لدی الله رب العالمین و یهدی الناس الی
